---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability
title: "feat: <one-line summary>"
labels: [enhancement]
---

**Problem**
What are you trying to do that alertly doesn't currently support? Concrete use case > abstract wish.

**Proposed solution**
If you have one. API shape, config change, etc.

**Alternatives considered**
What workarounds did you try?

**Scope**
- [ ] Belongs in alertly core
- [ ] Could be a new source plugin
- [ ] Could be a chart-only change
- [ ] Other / not sure
